input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.7.4
            TITLE: the voltage indicator must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.7.4: The Voltage Indicator must:
EV.5.7.4 The Voltage Indicator must:  
a. Be located where it is clearly visible when connecting/disconnecting the Accumulator 
Tractive System connections 
b. Be labeled “High Voltage Present”

final_answer: rule EV.5.7.4: The Voltage Indicator must: EV.5.7.4 The Voltage Indicator must: a. Be located where it is clearly visible when connecting/disconnecting the Accumulator Tractive System connections b. Be labeled “High Voltage Present”
